description_long: This all-terrain vehicle features a robust, open-frame design with a visible roll cage and exposed mechanical components, emphasizing durability and off-road capability. The body is primarily black with orange accents, and it sports large, rugged tires suitable for a variety of surfaces. The front end is equipped with a reinforced bumper and a compact hood, while the rear houses a visible engine compartment and exhaust system. The side panels display racing numbers and stylized graphics, adding a sporty, competitive appearance. The seating area is open, with a low profile and minimalistic dashboard, likely controlled by a steering wheel. The vehicle's construction suggests a focus on performance, safety, and maneuverability in challenging urban or off-road environments.
description: A rugged, open-frame all-terrain vehicle with a roll cage, large off-road tires, and sporty black and orange styling. Exposed mechanical parts and racing graphics highlight its performance-oriented design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the reinforced bumper, compact hood, and the roll cage structure, with large tires and visible suspension components.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the open cockpit, racing graphics, exposed engine parts, and the full length of the roll cage.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the engine compartment, exhaust system, and rear bumper, with the roll cage and rear tires prominently visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the open seating area, roll cage, and detailed tire and suspension setup.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires feature a blocky, all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves and pronounced lugs, designed for optimal traction on both urban and off-road surfaces.
